{{Infobox character
| name = Cheska Bennett
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
| name = Cheska Bennett
| aliases = Cheska, Bennett
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Sea, The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Head of the Navigator’s Guild, captain, Guild Head, Navigator, Head of the Navigators
| abilities = uses a curved saber, uses a captain's horn, Soulbound to her ship
| affiliations = Navigator’s Guild, Guild of Navigators
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Cheska Bennett Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Cheska Bennett is the Head of the [[Navigator’s Guild]] and the captain of the ship known as [[The Eternal]]. A [[Soulbound]] to her vessel, she is a prominent figure among the various [[Guilds]] and has been described as a promising young woman with significant connections and wealth. Her personality is characterized by a tendency toward exaggeration, a cocky or grinning demeanor, and a whirlwind-like manner of conducting herself. She often favors practical, rumpled attire—such as patched jackets and bandanas—over formal dress, though she has been known to wear large, distinctive hats. In her professional capacity, Bennett is a decisive leader who prefers spending time on the water rather than in her office, which is filled with various maritime treasures and memorabilia. She has demonstrated a willingness to lead military actions, including planning to head the [[Navigator]]'s [[Guild]] in an attack on the [[Gray Island]] once her ship is seaworthy. Despite her bravado, she has faced significant hardship, including the loss of half her crew and part of her ship during an attack by the [[Optasia]], which resulted in her sustaining a facial injury that required the use of an eyepatch. While she is respected and influential, her reliability and political allegiances have been subjects of scrutiny among other leaders like Naberius and [[General Teach]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|As a member of the [[Guild]] of Navigators and one of its esteemed [[Guild Heads]], Cheska Bennett serves as the Head of the [[Navigator’s Guild]]. She is the captain of her own ship, [[The Eternal]], and is known for wielding a curved saber. Recognizable by her [[Izyrian]] red hair, gold-trimmed blue suit, and wide hat, she often sits at the head of the table. Her actions include sending a message, providing a recommendation, and authoring a burned message. Furthermore, she is a figure whom [[Calder]] seeks to defeat in a duel.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Cheska is the author of the burned message.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is the Head of the [[Navigator’s Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Cheska provided a recommendation.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Cheska sent a message.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c5">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is a member of the [[Guild]] of Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is the captain of [[The Eternal]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] uses a curved saber.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is a captain.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] has [[Izyrian]] red hair.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Cheska wears a gold-trimmed blue suit and a wide hat.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|Cheska is at the head of the table.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] owns a ship.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is someone [[Calder]] wants to beat in a duel.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c19">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Cheska Bennett]] is one of the [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Cheska Bennett]] is a [[Navigator]] and the owner of the ship [[The Eternal]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c20">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Cheska Bennett]] is against Bareius.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|After the destruction of her ship, Captain Cheska Bennett utilized her captain's horn to command. She eventually proposed a strategic solution for how to approach the Capital and was later seen organizing a search. Looking toward future combat, she intends to lead an attack once [[The Eternal]] has returned to the water.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Cheska Bennett]] is a character whose ship was destroyed.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c4">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Cheska provided a solution for approaching the Capital.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Cheska Bennett]] plans to lead an attack once [[The Eternal]] is back in the water.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Cheska is a captain who uses a captain's horn.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|Cheska was organizing a search.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c24">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska Bennett is a red-haired [[Guild]] Head with one eye covered by a ragged black eyepatch who leads the Navigators. After predicting that [[Calder]] would become involved in certain events, she was found staggering and exhausted beside him as he awoke. She provided [[Calder]] with mission details and estimates concerning [[The Reliable]] and Captain [[Tommison]], though she remained unable to defend herself against a [[Consultant Gardener]]. While waiting on the docks with a team of [[Readers]], she demonstrated her priority for her people by sending out a call for all remaining Navigators. Ultimately, she offered room on her own ship, [[The Eternal]], to those in need.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Bennett is a [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is a character who snorts at the mention of [[Elders]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is a person who predicted [[Calder]] would get involved.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is not capable of defending herself from a [[Consultant Gardener]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Cheska Bennett]] leads the Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska was leaning over [[Calder]] when he woke up.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is the Head of the Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is exhausted and staggering next to [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska provided [[Calder]] with estimates regarding Captain [[Tommison]] and [[The Reliable]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c8">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska provided information regarding the mission.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c10">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is waiting on the docks with a team of [[Readers]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is a [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska puts her people first.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Cheska Bennett]] has red hair tied back in a bandana.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Cheska Bennett]] has one eye covered by a ragged black eyepatch.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is present in the room with [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Cheska Bennett]] sent out the call for all remaining Navigators.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska is someone who has room on [[The Eternal]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Cheska owns the ship [[The Eternal]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Cheska Bennett]] is [[Soulbound]] to her ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Cheska Bennett]] is present in the room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Cheska Bennett]] pretended the recall of the fleet to the Capital was in anticipation of the crisis.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Cheska Bennett. Member of the proud Guild of Navigators, and recently made captain of The Eternal.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Cheska Bennett. Member of the proud Guild of Navigators, and recently made captain of The Eternal.”<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|"Cheska Bennett isn’t unreasonable, but for now, she’s firmly against us."<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c26" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“With Elders?” Cheska said with a snort.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|“Cheska will find room for you on The Eternal,” Calder said.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Navigator’s Guild]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
[[Category:Readers]]
